title: CropReach lead-validation in Colab — 14k valid of 17k
html:
Google Colab notebook lead_processor_v2.ipynb running domain-validation passes for the Rankett outbound machine: a 22k "CropReach" leads list shows 14,036 valid / 17,402 invalid, with 22 chunked CSVs (CropReach_Chunk_1 through _22) each ~1000 rows, validity ranging from 26% to 99% per chunk. Earlier leads (1).csv shows 26,085 invalid — the lead-cleaning pipeline behind Diddles' cold-email engine.

TL;DR

  • Rankett runs lead validation through a Google Colab notebook (lead_processor_v2.ipynb) — bulk CSV in, valid/invalid split per chunk.
  • "CropReach" 22k leads → 14k valid (~64% pass rate) feeds the cold email machine Diddles is running.
  • Pattern: validate-then-mass-send is the operational backbone of the AEO outreach arm.

rankett · diddles · google colab · aeo agency · cold email machine
